name: Zucchini and Chile Corn Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat until hot.
2. Add zucchini and onion; cook uncovered, stirring constantly, for 5 minutes or until zucchini is soft. Remove from heat; set aside.
3. Beat eggs in a large bowl; stir in rice, corn chiles, cheese, zucchini mixture, and salt. Mix well.
4. Pour into a 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan coated with cooking spray.
5. Bake at 375 degrees for 45 to 50 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
Substitute a very mild feta cheese for queso fresco, if desired.
